title: neoalsomitra suberosa
intro: Neoalsomitra suberosa, also known as the prickly caterpillar tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. The medicinal properties of Neoalsomitra suberosa include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The herbal preparations of Neoalsomitra suberosa include decoctions and infusions made from its roots and leaves, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
